project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, Accelerate, marmelroy/Zip

completed: Phase 1–4: All previously complete (P1.1–P1.6, P2, P2.5, iOS live testing phases 1–4)
Phase 5 DONE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/EML format expansion
Phase 6 DONE — WorkflowRunner + 5 templates + full UI
Session 2026-03-25: Bug fixes and feature additions from user testing feedback:
Fix 1 — DocumentPickerPresenter timing: asyncAfter(0.5s) + permissive guard for isBeingDismissed
→ Resolves 'can't add documents to a non-empty library' (critical)
Fix 2 — Icon confusion: replaced gearshape.2 with cpu in KBListView, ContentView tab bar,
WorkflowListView emptyState and workflowRow fallback icon
Fix 3 — Debug reset functions: added @Environment(\.dismiss) to SettingsView; both
resetOnboarding() and resetAllData() now call dismiss() so the sheet closes before
ContentView shows the onboarding fullScreenCover
Fix 4 — Tutorial updated: OnboardingView page 3 (Import Docs) updated to list all formats
(PDF, ePub, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, EML, HTML, CSV, code…); new Workflows/Agents onboarding
slide inserted between Chat and Agent Tools pages; LibraryView empty-state text and
IngestStepRow detail also updated to include all formats
Fix 5 — Workflow builder: added WorkflowTemplates.custom (id='custom', icon=pencil.and.outline);
WorkflowListViewModel.customPrompt @Published field; createWorkflow() handles custom case
(builds begin→retrieve→llm(user prompt)→answer pipeline); NewWorkflowSheet shows TextEditor
with slot-name footer when Custom is selected; Create button disabled guard updated
Session 2026-03-25 (continued): Landscape simulator QA on iPad Pro 13-inch M5, iOS 26.4:
— Simulator click calibration: scale_x=0.3526, scale_y=0.3565, chrome_x=54, chrome_y=91
window at screen (944,49) size 976×805; simctl io screenshot → sips -r 90 for landscape
— Verified: My Library selection in split-view sidebar ✓
— Verified: Chat view landscape layout (search banner, suggested questions, text field) ✓
— Verified: Documents empty state — 'No Documents Yet', updated format list in IngestStepRow ✓
— Verified: Workflows sheet opens from cpu toolbar button (screen x=1050, y=177) ✓
— Verified: WorkflowListView empty state shows cpu chip icon (not gearshape.2) ✓
— Verified: New Workflow sheet — all 6 templates listed including Custom ✓
— Verified: Selecting Custom shows System Prompt TextEditor with {input}/{context} footer ✓
— Verified: KB picker wired to 'My Library' in New Workflow form ✓
next_steps: P7.1 — Fresh install wipe test end-to-end on real device
P7.2 — Replace silent try? with proper error propagation; fix try! migrate() crash risk
— Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing & Capabilities for real-device deployment
— Build and test the document-picker fix on device (critical path: add doc to non-empty library)
— Add Categorize node type to WorkflowRunner for branching workflows
— Add workflow edit UI (change KB, rename)
— Investigate Deep Summarizer 'Failed' status shown in user screenshot (may be LLM error)

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM not set — user must configure in Xcode for real device
known_gaps.try_bang_migrate: DatabaseService.init uses try! migrate() — crashes on migration failure
known_gaps.workflow_edit: No UI to edit an existing workflow's name or KB after creation — delete and recreate
known_gaps.workflow_failed: Deep Summarizer shown as 'Failed' in user screenshot — root cause uninvestigated
